name: Crepes with Salmon Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a skillet; add fresh sliced mushrooms and sauté about 2 minutes.
2. Add the onion and celery and continue to sauté for 3-4 minutes longer.
3. Blend in the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 more minutes.
4. Add the chicken broth, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
5. Blend in the flaked salmon, sour cream, pimientos, and parsley. Heat for 1 minute.
6. Place 1/4 cup filling on each of the crepes. Roll the crepes and place seam side down in a greased baking pan in a single layer.
7. Spoon remaining filling over the crepes; sprinkle with Swiss cheese and bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 20 minutes or until hot and cheese is melted.
8. Place under broiler for 2 minutes to brown the cheese. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
